title: Company Names Tribunal decision: IKEA Property Group Ltd
body: "Application number 5083  Applicant Inter IKEA Systems B.V. objected to the name used by IKEA Property Group Ltd under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 27 March 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of IKEA Property Group Ltd is changed to 15474889, LTD. "
